song.title: Behold, What Manner of Love
song.author: Patricia Van Tine
song.lyrics: [V1] . G C G D Behold, what manner of love the Father has given unto us. . G C G D G Behold, what manner of love the Father has given unto us. . C G D That we should be called the sons of God. .G C G D G That we should be called the sons of God.
